entity.label: Diblaim
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Doubled cakes, the mother of Gomer, who was Hosea’s wife (Hos. 1:3).

nodes.label: Diblaim
nodes.description: Doubled cakes, the mother of Gomer, who was Hosea’s wife (Hos. 1:3).

verses.text: So he went and took Gomer the daughter of Diblaim; which conceived, and bare him a son.
